utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Anyway , I should go . Okay , bye .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Hi sweetie . So , what was with all the whispering ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I can not tell you . It is a secret .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Secret ? Married people are not supposed to have secrets between one another . We have too much love and respect for one another .

emotion_cause.span: 5_I can not tell you . It is a secret .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: No I am serious , we should tell each other everything . I do not have any secrets from you .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Really ? Okay , so why do not you tell me what happened to Ross Junior year at Disneyland ?

emotion_cause.span: 8_we should tell each other everything . I do not have any secrets from you .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Oh no ... no , I can not do that .

emotion_cause.span: 9_why do not you tell me what happened to Ross Junior year at Disneyland ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: If you tell me , I will tell you what Phoebe said .

emotion_cause.span: 11_If you tell me , I will tell you what Phoebe said .
11_If you tell me , I will tell you what Phoebe said .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: So , Ross and I are going to Disneyland and we stop at this restaurant for tacos . And when I say restaurant , I mean a guy , a hibachi , and the trunk of his car . So Ross has about 10 tacos . And anyway , we’re on Space Mountain and Ross starts to feel a little iffy .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Oh my God . He threw up ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: No , he visited a little town south of throw up . So what was Phoebe secret ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Oh , Nancy Thompson from Phoebe old massage place is getting fired .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: That is it ? ! I gave up my Disneyland story for that ?

emotion_cause.span: 18_That is it ? ! I gave up my Disneyland story for that ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: That is right ! You lose sucker ! ! Please still marry me .
